overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a sun-drenched medieval Renaissance city (Beauclair). The character traverses cobblestone streets, passes through stone archways, and emerges into a bustling town square with stylized teal-orange color grading.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cemetery approach with stone monuments

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along cobblestone path toward a large stone archway, sword visible on back

entered.detail: two-story red plaster building with white trim and arched windows
tall cylindrical stone tower with conical roof attached to main structure
large stone archway entrance with brick accents and ivy growth
scattered stone grave markers and broken walls among grass
irregular cobblestone paving with grass growing between stones

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit cobblestone path through a historic cemetery area. A distinctive red villa stands to the left while a tall stone tower marks the destination ahead. The scene is bright and open with scattered trees and monuments.

events.description: entering deep shadow of the stone archway, dramatic light drop
transitioning from open outdoor space to enclosed covered passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark stone archway corridor toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls with brick arch patterns and hanging vegetation
black wrought iron lantern mounted on the stone wall
suit of medieval armor standing next to clay pots

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a dark, enclosed stone archway. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright sun to deep shadow. Stone walls flank both sides with a hanging lantern and armor display visible as the character moves toward the bright exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit residential street with classical architecture

events.description: exiting the archway into bright sunlight, eyes adjusting
emerging from covered passage into open city street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit street with a small dog now following closely behind

notable_agents.action: small dog following the character closely

entered.detail: three-story stone building with arched ground floor and shuttered windows
row of detailed stone buildings with decorative rooflines
stone railing with rounded balusters along the building edge
red-tiled dome visible above the rooftops in the distance
second large archway structure spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging into bright sunlight, the character walks along a cobblestone street lined with classical stone buildings. A small dog follows behind. The street leads toward another stone archway in the distance, with a cathedral dome visible above the rooftops.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching covered bridge archway with staircases

events.description: entering the shadow of the second stone archway bridge

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone bridge archway with NPCs visible sitting and standing along the walls

notable_agents.action: seated guard or merchant resting against the wall

entered.detail: curved stone stairs leading up to a balcony level with balustrade
tall black iron fence with pointed spikes along the right wall
ornate stone railing on top of the bridge structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a second stone archway that functions as a bridge overhead. A curved staircase climbs the left side while an iron spike fence lines the right. The lighting becomes mixed as the character enters the archway's shadow, with an NPC visible resting against the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city square with market stalls

events.description: exiting the shadowed archway into bright sunlight of the square
entering the bustling open market square from the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking into the busy town square with the dog still following, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in hat walking alongside the character briefly

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with red and white striped awnings and goods displayed
ornate stepped-gable buildings with gold and brown facades
building with prominent red fabric awning over the entrance
wide open cobblestone square with scattered market activity

segments.scene_description: Exiting the archway, the scene opens into a vibrant city square filled with market stalls under striped awnings. The architecture shifts to ornate gabled buildings, and the crowd density increases with pedestrians walking in various directions. The character continues forward through the bustling plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, sun-drenched cemetery into the heart of a bustling, ornate city square. It begins on a bright cobblestone path passing a red villa and a distant stone tower before the lighting shifts dramatically as the character enters a dark, enclosed stone archway flanked by armor displays. As the camera emerges back into the sunlight, the scene opens onto a classical street where a small dog follows the character toward a cathedral dome visible above the rooftops. The path then leads through a second shadowed archway featuring a curved staircase and an iron spike fence before finally breaking out into a vibrant plaza. This final transition reveals a crowded market filled with striped awnings and ornate gabled buildings as the character moves deeper into the lively city center.
